desc: If you control a Link-1 monster or a Level 2 Synchro Monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Cupsy‚ėÜYummy" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Yummy" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Cupsy‚ėÜYummy", or, if this card was Special Summoned by the effect of a Synchro Monster, you can draw 1 card instead. You can only use this effect of "Cupsy‚ėÜYummy" once per turn.
